hero.title: Your coming-of-age summer, not alone.
hero.lede: Join the early interest list for Trendies Global — a community for making new friends, expanding your circle and shaping real-life Chapter One plans together.

hub_cards.title: Join the interest list
hub_cards.body: Tell us where you are and what you would show up for.

hub_cards.title: Pin your flag
hub_cards.body: Show where the first Trendies are appearing.

hub_cards.title: Leave a note
hub_cards.body: Say what your coming-of-age summer should feel like.

vision.title: A community for having your coming-of-age chapter together.
paragraphs: Trendies is idea-stage and shaped by Trendies: a place for people who want their coming of age, but do not want to do it alone.

cards.title: Picnics + card games
cards.body: Low-pressure daylight plans where people can arrive alone and still feel held by the group.

cards.title: Bike rides + exploring
cards.body: Moving through a city together: parks, rivers, galleries, markets and somewhere new.

cards.title: Live music + short films
cards.body: Creative scenes, mini shoots, group memories and content that makes the chapter feel alive.

cards.title: New friends with drive
cards.body: At the heart, this is for people who want to expand their group and make new friends.

join.title: Tell us where Chapter One should start.
join.body: Add your name if you want your coming-of-age summer, not alone. Your answers show where people are, what plans they want, and what would make it feel safe.
join.data_note: This is an interest list, not a ticket or confirmed event.

guide.title: How to have your coming of age.
guide.body: Less perfect movie scene, more tiny brave yeses: leave the house, pick somewhere public, bring a snack, and let the day become a story.

steps.title: Choose a daylight plan
steps.body: Park picnic, gallery walk, market loop, beach day, bike ride, live music, or card games on a blanket.

steps.title: Make it easy to join
steps.body: Share a clear time, public location, what to bring, and whether people can arrive alone.

steps.title: Collect proof you lived
steps.body: Take photos, film tiny clips, write one line on the wall, and save the details that felt cinematic.

steps.title: Expand your circle
steps.body: Talk to the person who also came alone, swap socials, and join the Instagram channel for updates.

map.title: Pin your country. Watch the wall grow.
map.body: Choose your country. Your flag joins the wall and the count updates live as Trendies join from around the world.

wall.title: Leave a line for the summer.
wall.body: Notes save as pending for review. The public wall stays warm, safe and readable.
prompts: My coming-of-age summer would feel like picnics, card games, and people who actually make plans.
I would come if it was daylight, public, clear, and okay to arrive alone.
I want to make new friends and expand my circle with people who have drive.

story.title: This is our prologue.
paragraphs: For me, coming of age is picnics, bike rides, live music, card games, short films, exploring somewhere new, and people who make the day feel bigger.
Trendies is for the in-between: back home, between chapters, new city, new life, or simply ready to expand your circle.
This is born out of a desire to have our coming of age, not just watch it happen online.

partners.title: Help create this reality.
partners.body: Trendies needs photographers, filmmakers, city connectors, student societies, venues, brands, organisers, designers, sponsors and friends who want to help create a coming-of-age summer offline.

cards.title: Brands / sponsors
cards.body: Support safe public plans, city chapters, content and launch moments.

cards.title: City helpers
cards.body: Suggest places, bring friends, help shape a chapter in your city or country.

cards.title: Creative partners
cards.body: Photo, film, design, social content, storytelling and launch visuals.
